top_signals.title: Zelenskyy says ‘battle in the sky’ will decide outcome of war with Russia
top_signals.summary: Ukrainian leader says Donald Trump has changed his mind about the conflict
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Talks Tested as LNG Ship Struck in Hormuz Strait
top_signals.summary: A laden liquefied natural gas carrier was hit by a projectile near the Omani coast as it exited the Strait of Hormuz, heightening unease among shipowners and testing a US-Iran agreement intended to halt attacks in the waterway. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Property Developer K Raheja Said to Delay $700 Million IPO
top_signals.summary: K Raheja Corp. Pvt., one of India’s largest real estate developers, has delayed plans for an initial public offering after feedback from investment bankers, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
